posts.text: Mr Don’t Die! Thank you to the human voodoo doll @bryanjohnson_ for pulling up. We discuss how he has pretty much donated his body to science while he is still alive, the data he’s seen on the best and worst foods for us, and why he sees a connection between AI and a higher power. He’s going for infinity, and he makes an interesting case for how he can do it. Decide for yourself. Episode out now everywhere!
